name: Byadh
overview: When the case of the brutal beheading of scores of sparrows across the villages of Bengal lands up at Kolkata Police's department of unusual cases, veteran inspector Kanaichoron and newcomer Souvik start their hunt for the killer. On the thrilling investigative trail, they discover shocking secrets deep-rooted in the history of Bengal!

trailers.title: Byadh (ব্যাধ) | Official Trailer | Anirban, Rajatava | 11 Feb | hoichoi
